chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-4698 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on CMA No.19637/2025. 2. For orders on Office Objection No.2 & 5. 3. For orders on CMA No.19638/2025. 4. For orders on CMA No.19639/2025. 5. For hearing of main case. 29.09.2025. Mr. Qazi Ali Kamal, Advocate for the Petitioner. ----- YOUSUF ALI SAYEED, J. - The Petitioner professes to be a joint proprietor of a trademark and certain copyrights in respect of a washing powder traded under the name and style of “Suraj”. He has invoked the jurisdiction of this Court under Article 199 of the Constitution, seeking that directions be issued to the Registrar Trademarks and Registrar Copyrights for ascertaining the veracity of a Deed of Assignment and a Power of Attorney said to have been submitted for him to be replaced as one of the proprietors by a third party, and for further proceedings, including penal action, to be initiated upon confirmation that those documents have been forged. Having considered the matter, we find the Petition to be misconceived as it relates to a private dispute, that too entailing disputed questions of fact. Needless to say, if the Petitioner has a genuine grievance in respect of the aforementioned documents, he ought to initiate appropriate civil proceedings so as to impugn the veracity thereof, wherein the official Respondents may also be impleaded. Furthermore, 2 the Petitioner is at liberty to set the criminal justice system in motion of his own accord by registering as FIR on the score of forgery, if so desired. That being so, while granting the application for urgency, we hereby dismiss the Petition in limine, along with the other miscellaneous applications.

Furthermore, 2 the Petitioner is at liberty to set the criminal justice system in motion of his own accord by registering as FIR on the score of forgery, if so desired. That being so, while granting the application for urgency, we hereby dismiss the Petition in limine, along with the other miscellaneous applications. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
